title: Sneak's INSANE Weapons
description: A mod that adds 3 new weapons to the game.
body:
Sneak's INSANE Weapons is a mod that adds 3 new weapons to the game:

## REQUIRES GECKOLIB

- **Steampunk Axe** - An axe in the steampunk theme, with the powers of lightning. Right click activates lightning that attacks all entities in the direction the player is looking!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Steampunk Axe](https://imgur.com/oLfSKcg.jpg)

</details>



- **Blood Chokutō** - A sword in the anime theme, with the powers of blood. Right click activates a powerful blood slash attack in the direction the player is looking!


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Blood Sword](https://imgur.com/FJbJC4i.jpg)

</details>



- **Space Ballista** - A "bow" in a futuristic theme, with the cosmic abilities. Player can mount the ballista and fire a devastating bolt. (Currently the ballista only faces south, works only using creative flight, and you will need to set a keybind to fire besides space). With the /setballistaradius command, you can change the power of the bolt. Default is /setballistaradius 5. I do not recommend going above 10 for most PCs.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Space Ballista](https://imgur.com/5ISEO8W.jpg)

</details>

[![BisectHosting Discount Code Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/cbfc0ef9-e5d2-4095-891f-8c898b76f012.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/SNEAK)

This mod was made for [Sneak's Youtube Channel](https://www.youtube.com/@yaboysneak)

Developed by EthRocky
